_doc: Branch protection rules for chudeemeke/get-stuff-done main. Phase 40.5 Wave 1.7 (amendment A-11). Loaded by scripts/setup-branch-protection.sh. To verify live state: gh api repos/chudeemeke/get-stuff-done/branches/main/protection | jq.
_required_status_checks_rationale: The list reflects the A-06+A-10 binding-gate set (Workflow Lint, Lint, Source Parity Check, Boundary & Override Check) PLUS the new Secret Scan job from Wave 1.7-A. Test (3 OSes) is intentionally OMITTED because A-10 allowlists 4 chronic test failures inherited from main since 2026-03-31; making Test required would prevent ANY PR from merging until Phase 41 REL-01 closes those chronics. Test joins the required list when REL-01 ships.
_required_pull_request_reviews_rationale: Option A from Wave 1.7 design discussion: required_approving_review_count=1 with enforce_admins=false. Solo maintainer can self-merge via admin power; future contributor PRs see 'review required' signal. Increase to 2 when a second maintainer joins.
_restrictions_note: restrictions=null means anyone with push access can push (subject to other rules). For solo-maintainer single-account this is correct. Tighten if/when teams form.
_block_creations_note: block_creations=false allows new branches off main. Default GitHub behavior.
